requests.request: The headphones I received are not working properly; the left ear doesn't produce any sound.
The tablet I ordered arrived with a cracked screen, even though it was well-packaged.
The order I received for my new watch has a different band color than what I selected.
I noticed that the battery life for my new phone is significantly shorter than advertised.
The shipment I was expecting has not been delivered, even though the tracking shows it was delivered to my address.
The laptop charger I bought is not compatible with my model, even though it was listed as compatible.
The camera I ordered arrived with a firmware version that is outdated and not supported anymore.
I received an item that looks different from the product image on your website, and it seems to be used.
Could you please clarify the warranty period for the gaming console I recently purchased?
What is the process for returning a product that is defective and requesting a replacement?
